heading: Cooperation between Secretary of the Interior and Federal and State authorities
label: 715m Cooperation between Secretary of the Interior and Federal and State authorities
text: The Secretary of the Interior, in carrying out the Act of , as amended (15 U.S.C., ch. 15A), is authorized to cooperate with Federal and State authorities.February 22, 1935
notes: References in TextAct of , referred to in text, is , , popularly known as the “Hot Oil Act” and also as the “Connally Hot Oil Act”, which is classified generally to this chapter. For complete classification of this Act to the Code, see Short Title note set out under and Tables.February 22, 1935act Feb. 22, 1935, ch. 1849 Stat. 30section 715 of this title
CodificationSection was not enacted as a part of act , which comprises this chapter.Feb. 22, 1935
